verdict.summary: The change correctly makes the built-in trust-surface manifest a mandatory floor and unions policy-supplied paths onto it at both enforcement call sites. Normalization, stable de-duplication, malformed-entry handling, and empty/None fallback are sound for the actual argparse/call-site inputs. The added self-tests are non-vacuous and directly cover the prior replacement weakness, including the concrete case where a narrow custom list omitted scripts/. No trust check, SHA binding, audit behavior, permissions, or token handling is weakened by this diff.
